div.div: Sono Bisque Doll wa Koi wo Suru
Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life

High schooler Wakana Gojou cares about one thing: making Hina dolls. With nobody to share his obsession, he has trouble finding friends—or even holding conversation. But after the school’s most popular girl, Marin Kitagawa, reveals a secret of her own, he discovers a new purpose for his sewing skills. Together, they’ll make her cosplay dreams come true!
(Source: Funimation)

Tomboy Tomo couldn’t have picked a more awkward high school crush ’cause it’s on her childhood friend, Junichiro, but he only sees her as one of the guys. Despite her pretty looks and signals, nothing gets through to this meathead! Will Junichiro ever realize Tomo’s into him and see her for the cutesy girl she actually is?!
(Source: Crunchyroll)

With the highest kaiju-emergence rates in the world, Japan is no stranger to attack by deadly monsters. Enter the Japan Defense Force, a military organization tasked with the neutralization of kaiju. Kafka Hibino, a kaiju-corpse cleanup man, has always dreamed of joining the force. But when he gets another shot at achieving his childhood dream, he undergoes an unexpected transformation. How can he fight kaiju now that he’s become one himself?!
(Source: VIZ Media)

In a world where awakened beings called “Hunters” must battle deadly monsters to protect humanity, Seong Jin-U, nicknamed “the weakest hunter of all mankind,” finds himself in a constant struggle for survival. One day, after a brutal encounter in an overpowered dungeon wipes out his party and threatens to end his life, a mysterious System chooses him as its sole player: Jin-U has been granted the rare opportunity to level up his abilities, possibly beyond any known limits. Follow Jin-U’s journey as he takes on ever-stronger enemies, both human and monster, to discover the secrets deep within the dungeons and the ultimate extent of his powers. (Source: Tappytoon) Note: Includes 22 extra chapters.
Ryoushin no Shakkin wo Katagawari Shite Morau Jouken wa Nihonichi Kawaii Joshikousei to Issho ni Kurasu Koto deshita.
Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life

The main character, Yoshizumi Yuya, was being pressured into paying off the debt left by his parents who had fled abroad. It was his classmate, Hitotsuba Kaede, chosen as the cutest schoolgirl in Japan, who saved him from this crisis of life and death. However, there was a catch. The condition required to fulfill in return for taking over his debt was — “In return for the loan, you have – to live with me.”
Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life

Timid Ooyama keeps to himself at school, and he certainly never gets involved with Akutsu Riko, a delinquent as buxom as she is notorious. But when she turns up at his apartment out of the blue, what’s he supposed to do, kick her out? She’s gorgeous! And scary! But things get complicated when Akutsu asks to stay the night, then starts turning up over and over again after school–reading Ooyama’s manga, sprawling out on his bed, and digging up his smut stash. Why exactly is she claiming his life as her hangout?! She makes it clear there’s no way she could possibly like him, but the teasing threatens to boil over into something more in this sexy yet adorable slice-of-life rom-com!
(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
Boku to Gal ga Fuufu ni Naru made

Saku Kanakura was a boy born into a poor household. He studied hard and managed to pass the exam to an excellent high school, but it soon turned out that his parents were in debt! When it was time to pay the debt off, a mysterious gal appeared and offered to pay off their debt. A big burden was almost off Kanakura's head, but the gal made a condition in return which stated that—
Osananajimi Kanojo no Morahara ga Hidoi n de Zetsuen Sengen Shite Yatta: Jibun Rashiku Ikiru Koto ni Shitara, Naze ka Tonari no Seki no Kakure Bishoujo kara Kokuhaku Sareta

I, Soma Ichinose, a high school boy, is continuously harassed by my former childhood friend and current girlfriend, Hanabi Kisaragi. I finally reach my limit and decide to break up with her. I won't be tormented by that devilish girlfriend anymore, and I'll live my life the way I want to, for the better. Now that I'm no longer under Hanabi's spell, I can begin to enjoy my school life to the fullest. Yes, it's not too late. The girl sitting next to me, Fumi Yukiyo, wears large glasses give her a strong impression of being stand-offish from the other students. But in the course of conversation with her, I noticed that her personality is the complete opposite of Hanabi's, and I find myself falling for her...?

(Source: Dash X Bunko, translated)

Minamikawa knows a secret about her classmate, Takamori.

Or rather, she’s forced to know, since as a telepath, she can hear Takamori's thoughts...which on most days, contain blatant confessions of his love for her!

A high school rom-com about an easily flustered telepathic girl wants to shut up her secret suiter's lovey-dovey thoughts!

(Source: Manga UP!)
